chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR _.P No.D-714 0f 2023 Date Order ith signature فf Judge For hearing of maln case. 310&2023 Mr Azad Iqbal Markhand Advocate with Petitioner Mr Mehboob Ali Wassan AAG H##++++++++++++++ Mr Akhtiar Ali Heesbani advocate has filed Vakalatnama ٥٨ behalf of Respondent No6 which is taken on record and submits two original cheques of Rs10OOOO/- each, which have handed over to the Petitioner; however with regard to remaining amount ie Rs.109ZOOO/- would be to the petitioner in three consecutive monthly installments Petitioner and her Counse satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of The compliance report shall be submitted after three months for perusal in chamber along been paid
